short_desc_en: A 20-day momentum baseline presented with a sign-check diagnostic to explain why the naive direction is negative.
short_desc_zh: 一个带方向检查诊断的 20 日动量基线，用来解释为什么原始方向是负的。

description.motivation_en: This baseline anchors the custom factors against a familiar medium-horizon momentum benchmark.
description.motivation_zh: 这个基线用一个熟悉的中周期动量基准来锚定自定义因子的表现。
description.construction_en: The raw baseline ranks stocks by their trailing 20-day return. The page also includes a sign-check diagnostic that flips the direction to test whether the horizon is informative but mis-signed.
description.construction_zh: 原始基线按过去 20 日收益排序。页面同时加入了一个方向检查诊断：将信号方向翻转，用于测试该 horizon 是否本身有信息，只是原始方向错了。
description.interpretation_en: In the current sample, naive 20-day momentum is negative. That does not necessarily mean the 20-day horizon is useless; it more likely indicates that the baseline loads the wrong direction under this setup.
description.interpretation_zh: 在当前样本中，原始 20 日动量是负的。这并不一定意味着 20 日 horizon 完全无效，更可能说明在这套设定下它加载了错误的方向。

analysis_note_en: The useful part of this baseline is the diagnosis. Raw 20-day momentum is negative here, but the sign-check shows that the horizon itself is not empty. The issue is that the naive direction is wrong under this setup.
analysis_note_zh: 这个基线真正有价值的地方，在于它提供了诊断信息。原始 20 日动量在这里是负的，但方向检查说明这个时间尺度本身不是没有信息，而是原始方向不对。

diagnostics.title_zh: 动量方向 sign-check 诊断
diagnostics.body_en: The raw 20-day momentum baseline is negative in this sample. Flipping the direction materially improves both return and drawdown, which suggests that the 20-day horizon itself is not useless; the main issue is that the naive sign points the wrong way under this setup.
diagnostics.body_zh: 在当前样本中，原始 20 日动量基线是负的。将方向翻转后，收益和回撤都会明显改善，这说明 20 日 horizon 本身未必没有信息，问题更可能在于原始方向在这套设定下指错了。
